business_ideas.idea: Build multiple five-figure-revenue brands monthly using TikTok Shop affiliate commission model

predictions.text: TikTok Shop represents 7-8x minimum ROAS versus 1-1.5x on Facebook/Amazon, creating optimal distribution window now.
Looks-maxing and masculine wellness trends will drive $100M+ category opportunities in skincare and fitness.
Short-form content creator economy will displace traditional influencer marketing within 18-24 months.
